title: Ghostify Lite for Hypixel SkyBlock
description: Minimalist Hypixel SkyBlock QoL mod for modern Minecraft (1.21+). Modern SkyBlock experience enhanced.
body:
A minimalist mod for making a non-s_cking game experience, like what it should be.

_Dynamic island_®? Pickobulus preview? We have things that you had not even imagined!

## Features

#### _Dynamic Island_®

- TPS display, low TPS reminder
- Invincibility time countdown, invincibility item cooldown countdown
- Ragnarock Timer, shows remaining time for Ragnarock ability
- Autopet reminder
- Spirit pet warning
- Lobby history, last visit time display
- (Support switch/default off) Pickobulus preview
- (Support switch/default on) Foraging style warning
- (Support switch/default on) RNG drop summary

#### Module List HUD
Supports alignment adjustment. Comes with built-in HD smooth font implementation.
- (Support switch/default off) Day of the world display

#### Patches
- (Support switch/default off) 0 Ping Dungeonbreaker
  - Ignore mining fatigue immediately when holding Dungeonbreaker in Dungeons, making the whole mechanism fully client-side-based.
  - Only works when in Dungeons.
- (Support switch) Clear in-lava camera
- (Support switch) Remove suffocation screen
- (Support switch) Prevent pulling shortbow
- (Support switch) No command execution confirmation

#### Other
- Speed Dial
  - Call your contact easier and faster than ever. See gallery for showcase and in-game click GUI for instructions.
- Ghost Pickaxe Helper
  - Press and hold the Ghost Pickaxe key to quickly swap to the Dungeonbreaker in your hotbar, and release the key to swap back to the last selected item.
  - Only works when in Dungeons.
- (Support switch/default off) Auto Tip
- (Support switch/default on) Entrance Notifier
  - Pop up a system notification when entering Dungeon/Kuudra if the game window is not focused. Enjoy the Internet when waiting for downtime or party finder.
  - Requires newer system versions to work on Windows 10/11. Tested and worked on Windows 10 22H2 and Windows 11 23H2.
  - Requires libnotify to work on Linux.
  - macOS support may be broken; Please reach out at GitHub if you can help us fix that.
- (Support switch/default off) Force "Toggle Use"
  - Based on the new vanilla feature since 1.21.9, automatically enabling "toggle" mode when holding specific items.
  - Currently only enabled for Tribal Spear.
- (Support switch/default off) Prevent Goon clicks

## Additional Information

This mod, like its name, is a strict subset "lite" version of Ghostify, with controversial features removed. This mod is full legit, and is made to comply with the [Modrinth Content Rules](https://modrinth.com/legal/rules).

Inclusion in modpacks that have no additional acquisition/download prerequisites (e.g. VIP/membership) are allowed and welcomed.
